name: Mintos
description: Latvian investment marketplace API providing access to diversified income-generating loan assets for 500k+ users.

seo.title: Mintos — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Mintos: Latvian investment marketplace API providing access to diversified income-generating loan assets for 500k+ users.

when_to_use: API access to diversified loan investment assets for fintech platforms
Embedded alternative investment products via Mintos marketplace API
Portfolio diversification across loan originators via programmable investment API
Building income-generating investment features for consumer finance apps

pros: Regulated under Latvian and EU frameworks
cons: Not a payments gateway — investment platform
Retail investor risk from underlying loans
review.verdict: Investment marketplace miscategorized as payment gateway — useful only for investors, not merchants.
review.best_for: Institutional investors accessing European consumer loan assets
review.not_for: Merchants or platforms needing payment acceptance
